channel.title: OOIR Trends: Clinical Medicine (Integrative & Complementary Medicine)
channel.description: Aktuelle Paper-Trends im Bereich Clinical Medicine (Integrative & Complementary Medicine) von OOIR (mit Titel und Metadaten von Crossref)

item.title: Role of an Ayurvedic formulation ‘Kalyanaka Ghrita’ in mild cognitive impairment: A single-patient, quasi-randomized, controlled, open-label N-of-1 trial
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 13 Autoren: Swati Sharma, Arun Kaushik, Sankha Shubhra Chakrabarti, Kishor Patwardhan Journal: Journal of Ethnopharmacology Veröffentlicht: 2026-12-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.jep.2026.122089 ISSN: 0378-8741 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-15

item.title: Huang-Lian-Jie-Du Decoction alleviates cognitive deficits in Alzheimer’s disease via aromatase-mediated regulation of Aβ metabolism
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 7 Autoren: Mingguang Sun, Dongsheng Ye, Puxuan Min, Mengxiong Guo, Xiao Zhao, Yue Zhou, Lingxu Xu, Yutong Wu, Zhaoyou Meng, Gesheng Wang Journal: Phytomedicine Veröffentlicht: 2026-09-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.phymed.2026.158467 ISSN: 0944-7113 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-15

item.title: Polyphenols extracted from Lycium barbarum seeds regulate gut microbiota to improve type 2 diabetes mellitus in db/db mice
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 7 Autoren: Juntao Zhang, Rongyi Gong, Yichen Liu, Jianjun Deng, Jinfeng Wang, Haixia Yang Journal: Phytomedicine Veröffentlicht: 2026-09-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.phymed.2026.158507 ISSN: 0944-7113 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-15

item.title: Chrysin reprograms microglial metabolism and function via targeting SYK to alleviate the symptoms of Alzheimer's disease
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 7 Autoren: Lixi Li, Yanjia Gu, Xinyue Luo, Jinyu Wang, Ying Jia, Tingxu Yan Journal: Journal of Ethnopharmacology Veröffentlicht: 2026-11-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.jep.2026.122056 ISSN: 0378-8741 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-15

item.title: Chinese herbal and natural compounds for Parkinson's disease: Myth or truth
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 7 Autoren: Ruining Zhang, Yujie Chen, Yingtong Qian, Chengxi Zhu, Jian Yang, Jiquan Zhang Journal: Journal of Ethnopharmacology Veröffentlicht: 2026-11-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.jep.2026.122047 ISSN: 0378-8741 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-15
